config.seed_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text:
As soon this came up again it sounded like an ancient tune that was sung over time by people who had died for their music—a song about death but no longer singing itself; then suddenly they said something along the lines we hear here today from folk singers or at least heard many times now with us outside our groupings."

 (This quote has been changed.)

A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.

TEXT:
A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware. As soon this came up again it sounded like an ancient tune that was sung over time by people who had died for their music—a song about death but no longer singing itself; then suddenly they said something along the lines we hear here today from folk singers or at least heard many times now with us outside our groupings."
